creator: dr@domix.de
text:
Will Andrews <andrews@TECHNOLOGIST.COM> wrote:

> On 02-Oct-99 Dominik Rothert wrote:
> > X# $Id: $
> I'm not sure if this is a big deal, but I think this is supposed to be
> $FreeBSD$, not $Id$. Correct me if I'm wrong.

Sorry, you're wrong.  From the handbook (4.7.9. A Sample Makefile):

# $Id$
[ ^^^^ This will be automatically replaced with RCS ID string by CVS 
       when it is committed to our repository.]
#

Best wishes,
Dominik Rothert.
